title: P4: No neighbor eviction stats or expire method
description: Unlike pending_queue (has pending_evicted_dests) and ForwardingBuffer (has stats), neighbor LRU has no eviction counter or dtn-like expire_old for timeout. Add _neighbor_evicted: int = 0 and optional timeout based cleanup method. Fix all P4s before closing ug8i. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-ug8i
